_comment: Travel-agent cron jobs. The upsert-jobs.py script merges these into /home/openclaw/.openclaw/cron/jobs.json keyed by 'name', generating UUID / createdAtMs / anchorMs on insert and refreshing updatedAtMs on update. Pi's TZ is America/Chicago — cron expressions are interpreted in that TZ.

jobs.name: travel-watch
jobs.description: Watchlist health monitor: news sweep (SearXNG) + seasons/baseline staleness checks. Enqueues travel-deep-plan for stale destinations. Announces safety-relevant news to Matrix. Runs every 6 hours. v1 scope-cut — no live flight/hotel pricing until Amadeus+LiteAPI MCPs land.

payload.message: Load workspace/TRAVEL.md, then run the travel-watch skill. Budget: ≤20 SearXNG calls, ≤5 min thinking, ≤45s per destination. Per-destination news sweep + staleness enqueue. No price_history writes (v1 scope-cut).

jobs.name: travel-seasonality-refresh
jobs.description: Annual refresh of the seasons table. For every active destination with seasons.refreshed_at older than 365 days (or missing / low-confidence), re-synthesize via travel-seasonality-synth. Announces a summary + list of low-confidence (<0.4) destinations that need manual review. Runs Jan 2 at 03:00 America/Chicago.

payload.message: Load workspace/TRAVEL.md. For every active destination where seasons.refreshed_at is NULL or julianday('now')-julianday(seasons.refreshed_at) > seasons.ttl_days, invoke travel-seasonality-synth. Also populate wikivoyage_excerpts (section='climate') via openzim for any destination missing it. At end-of-run, post a Matrix summary: refreshed N / low-confidence {list of display_names}.

jobs.name: travel-seasonality-refresh-midyear
jobs.description: Mid-year refresh for climate-volatile zones only (Mediterranean, South Asia monsoon, SE Asia monsoon, Caribbean hurricane belt). Runs Jul 2 at 03:00 America/Chicago.

payload.message: Load workspace/TRAVEL.md. For active destinations whose country_code falls in a volatile zone (Mediterranean: ES IT GR HR PT TR MT CY; South Asia monsoon: IN PK BD NP LK; SE Asia monsoon: TH VN KH LA MY ID PH; Caribbean hurricane belt: DO CU JM PR BB TT BS HT), check seasons.refreshed_at with a 180-day TTL. Invoke travel-seasonality-synth for stale rows. Summary to Matrix.

jobs.name: travel-ecb-fx
jobs.description: Daily ECB reference-rate pull into fx_rates. Pure deterministic fetch — no LLM reasoning; the agent just exec's the Python script. Runs weekdays at 12:00 America/Chicago (covers both CET and CEST publication times with margin).

payload.message: Run: python3 /home/openclaw/.openclaw/scripts/travel-fx.py. Report stdout in the session log. If the script exits non-zero OR stdout does not start with 'fx_rates: upserted', post a Matrix alert with the tail of stderr and the exit code. Otherwise, do not post.

jobs.name: travel-annual-holidays
jobs.description: Annual US federal holidays refresh (current + next 2 years) with pto_efficiency annotation. Deterministic; no LLM. Runs Jan 1 at 03:00 America/Chicago.

payload.message: Run: python3 /home/openclaw/.openclaw/scripts/travel-holidays.py. If it exits non-zero, post a Matrix alert with the tail of stderr. Otherwise, do not post.
